ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the model file */,
  "classifier" TEXT /* Type of classifier used (e.g., SVC, naive_bayes) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* The dataset used to train the model */,
  "version_id" TEXT /* The version of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "f_measure" REAL /* F-measure score of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix represented in text format */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* The dataset used for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* The date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* The user who performed the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version_id" TEXT /* The version of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the dataset */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, evaluator, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client accessing the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* The name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Collaboration notes or insights */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the collaboration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
